zones.name: Nevada County, California
zones.label: Grass Valley / Nevada City / Auburn
zones.thesis: Sierra Foothills emerging market — retirees, remote workers moving in, underpriced vs Bay Area. Long DOM typical but motivated sellers real. Strong hidden gem potential for residential conversions, small commercial, land, and special purpose.
redFlags: wildfire risk Zone 4-5 without insurance solutions
zones.opportunity: Remote work migration creating demand that hasn't repriced assets yet. Buy before repricing.

zones.name: Colorado
zones.label: Denver Metro + Front Range + Western Slope

subZones.name: Denver Metro
subZones.thesis: High demand, diverse asset types. Hunt for pain-point sellers in transitional neighborhoods.

subZones.name: Front Range
subZones.thesis: Mil/defense around Springs. Fort Collins growth node. Pueblo underpriced — value-add heavy.

subZones.name: Western Slope
subZones.thesis: Tourism + remote work + energy. Grand Junction underpriced. Steamboat vacation rental play.

zones.opportunity: Migration inflows from CA, TX, IL. Diverse economy. Motivated sellers exist across all sub-zones.

zones.name: Nationwide Wide Net
zones.label: Best 3 Deals — Any State, Any Type
zones.thesis: No geographic filter. Pure deal quality. Looking for the best 3 opportunities in the entire US regardless of type — the deal must stand alone on fundamentals + hidden gem overlay.
zones.diversityRule: The 3 deals must be different asset classes — no duplicates allowed.

scanSources.name: CREXI
scanSources.notes: Primary for commercial. Use type filters + keyword search.

scanSources.name: Auction.com
scanSources.notes: Bank-owned and foreclosure auctions. Filter by county/state.

scanSources.name: Hubzu
scanSources.notes: Similar to auction.com. Good for residential distress.

scanSources.name: BizBuySell
scanSources.notes: Businesses for sale. Filter for 'real estate included' — owner finance common here.

scanSources.name: LoopNet
scanSources.notes: Secondary to CREXI. Good for redundancy and coverage.

scanSources.name: County Tax Auctions
scanSources.notes: Search '[county name] tax sale auction 2026'. Nevada County CA: nevadacountytax.com. Colorado: search by county.

scanSources.name: Zillow / Redfin
scanSources.notes: Residential pre-foreclosure, price cuts, FSBO. Filter for 90+ days on market.
